debug_info.goal:
k : ℕ
⊢ Presheaf.IsSheaf CartSp.openCoverTopology
    { obj := fun n => DSmoothMap (Eucl (Opposite.unop n)) (Eucl (Opposite.unop n) [⋀^Fin k]→ₗ[ℝ] ℝ),
      map := fun {n m} f ω => { toFun := fun x => (ω (f.unop x)).compLinearMap ↑(fderiv ℝ (⇑f.unop) x), dsmooth := ⋯ },
      map_id := ⋯, map_comp := ⋯ }

proof:
classical
    rw [CartSp.openCoverTopology, isSheaf_iff_isSheaf_of_type, Presieve.isSheaf_coverage]
    intro n s hs f hf
    classical
    refine ⟨⟨fun x ↦ ?_, ?_⟩, ?_, ?_⟩
    ·
      have hs' : ∀ x : n, _ := fun x ↦ Set.mem_iUnion.1 <| hs.2.symm ▸ Set.mem_univ x
      let k' := fun x ↦ (hs' x).choose
      have hk : ∀ x, ∃ f' : k' x ⟶ n, _ := fun x ↦ Set.mem_iUnion₂.1 (hs' x).choose_spec
      let f' := fun x ↦ (hk x).choose
      have hf' : ∀ x, s (f' x) ∧ x ∈ Set.range (f' x).1 :=
        fun x ↦ exists_prop.1 (hk x).choose_spec
      exact (f (f' x) (hf' x).1 (hf' x).2.choose) x
    ·
      have hs' : ∀ x : n, _ := fun x ↦ Set.mem_iUnion.1 <| hs.2.symm ▸ Set.mem_univ x
      let k' := fun x ↦ (hs' x).choose
      have hk : ∀ x, ∃ f' : k' x ⟶ n, _ := fun x ↦ Set.mem_iUnion₂.1 (hs' x).choose_spec
      let f' := fun x ↦ (hk x).choose
      have hf' : ∀ x, s (f' x) ∧ x ∈ Set.range (f' x).1 :=
        fun x ↦ exists_prop.1 (hk x).choose_spec
      have hf'' :
          ∀ l (g : l ⟶ n) (hg : s g),
            (fun x : n ↦ (f (f' x) (hf' x).1 (hf' x).2.choose) x) ∘ g =
              f g hg := by
        intro l g hg; ext x
        have h := @hf _ _ 0 (DSmoothMap.const _ (hf' (g x)).2.choose)
          (DSmoothMap.const _ x) _ _ (hf' (g x)).1 hg
          (by ext; exact (hf' (g x)).2.choose_spec)
        exact DFunLike.congr_fun h 0
      refine dsmooth_iff_locally_dsmooth.2 fun x : n ↦
        ⟨_, (hs.1 _ _ (hf' x).1).isOpen_range, (hf' x).2, ?_⟩
      rw [(DDiffeomorph.ofIsInduction (hs.1 _ _ (hf' x).1).1).isSubduction.dsmooth_iff]
      convert (f (f' x) (hf' x).1).2 using 1
      exact hf'' (k' x) (f' x) (hf' x).1
    ·
      intro l g hg; ext x
      have hs' : ∀ x : n, _ := fun x ↦ Set.mem_iUnion.1 <| hs.2.symm ▸ Set.mem_univ x
      let k' := fun x ↦ (hs' x).choose
      have hk : ∀ x, ∃ f' : k' x ⟶ n, _ := fun x ↦ Set.mem_iUnion₂.1 (hs' x).choose_spec
      let f' := fun x ↦ (hk x).choose
      have hf' : ∀ x, s (f' x) ∧ x ∈ Set.range (f' x).1 :=
        fun x ↦ exists_prop.1 (hk x).choose_spec
      have hf'' :
          ∀ l (g : l ⟶ n) (hg : s g),
            (fun x : n ↦ (f (f' x) (hf' x).1 (hf' x).2.choose) x) ∘ g =
              f g hg := by
        intro l g hg; ext x
        have h := @hf _ _ 0 (DSmoothMap.const _ (hf' (g x)).2.choose)
          (DSmoothMap.const _ x) _ _ (hf' (g x)).1 hg
          (by ext; exact (hf' (g x)).2.choose_spec)
        exact DFunLike.congr_fun h 0
      exact congr_fun (hf'' l g hg) x
    ·
      intro f''' hf'''; ext (x : n)
      have hs' : ∀ x : n, _ := fun x ↦ Set.mem_iUnion.1 <| hs.2.symm ▸ Set.mem_univ x
      let k' := fun x ↦ (hs' x).choose
      have hk : ∀ x, ∃ f' : k' x ⟶ n, _ := fun x ↦ Set.mem_iUnion₂.1 (hs' x).choose_spec
      let f' := fun x ↦ (hk x).choose
      have hf' : ∀ x, s (f' x) ∧ x ∈ Set.range (f' x).1 :=
        fun x ↦ exists_prop.1 (hk x).choose_spec
      have hf'' :
          ∀ l (g : l ⟶ n) (hg : s g),
            (fun x : n ↦ (f (f' x) (hf' x).1 (hf' x).2.choose) x) ∘ g =
              f g hg := by
        intro l g hg; ext x
        have h := @hf _ _ 0 (DSmoothMap.const _ (hf' (g x)).2.choose)
          (DSmoothMap.const _ x) _ _ (hf' (g x)).1 hg
          (by ext; exact (hf' (g x)).2.choose_spec)
        exact DFunLike.congr_fun h 0
      rw [← (hf' x).2.choose_spec]
      exact (DFunLike.congr_fun (hf''' (f' x) (hf' x).1) _).trans
        (congr_fun (hf'' _ (f' x) (hf' x).1) _).symm
failed_attempts:
classical
    rw [CartSp.openCoverTopology, isSheaf_iff_isSheaf_of_type, Presieve.isSheaf_coverage]
    refine fun {n} s hs g hg ↦ ?_
    have hs' : ∀ x : n, _ := fun x ↦ Set.mem_iUnion.1 <| hs.2.symm ▸ Set.mem_univ x
    let k' := fun x ↦ (hs' x).choose
    have hk : ∀ x, ∃ f' : k' x ⟶ n, _ := fun x ↦ Set.mem_iUnion₂.1 (hs' x).choose_spec
    let f' := fun x ↦ (hk x).choose
    have hf' : ∀ x, s (f' x) ∧ x ∈ Set.range (f' x).1 :=
      fun x ↦ exists_prop.1 (hk x).choose_spec
    let g' := fun x ↦ g (f' x) (hf' x).1 (hf' x).2.choose
    have hg' :
        ∀ l (h : l ⟶ n) (hh : s h), g' ∘ h = g h hh := fun l h hh ↦ by
          ext x
          dsimp [g']
          have hcompat :=
            @hg _ _ 0 (DSmoothMap.const _ (hf' (h x)).2.choose)
              (DSmoothMap.const _ x) _ _ (hf' (h x)).1 hh
              (by ext; exact (hf' (h x)).2.choose_spec)
          exact DFunLike.congr_fun hcompat 0
    refine ⟨⟨g', ?_⟩, ?_, ?_⟩
    · refine dsmooth_iff_locally_dsmooth.2 fun x : n ↦
        ⟨_, (hs.1 _ _ (hf' x).1).isOpen_range, (hf' x).2, ?_⟩
      rw [(DDiffeomorph.ofIsInduction (hs.1 _ _ (hf' x).1).1).isSubduction.dsmooth_iff]
      convert (g (f' x) (hf' x).1).2
      exact hg' (k' x) (f' x) (hf' x).1
    · intro l h hh; ext x; exact congr_fun (hg' l h hh) _
    · intro g'' hg''; ext (x : n)
      rw [← (hf' x).2.choose_spec]
      exact (DFunLike.congr_fun (hg'' (f' x) (hf' x).1) _).trans
        (congr_fun (hg' _ (f' x) (hf' x).1) _).symm

rw [CartSp.openCoverTopology, isSheaf_iff_isSheaf_of_type, Presieve.isSheaf_coverage]
    intro n s hs f hf
    classical
    refine ⟨⟨fun x ↦ ?_, ?_⟩, ?_, ?_⟩
    · classical
      have hs' : ∀ x : n, _ := fun x ↦ Set.mem_iUnion.1 <| hs.2.symm ▸ Set.mem_univ x
      let kx : n → CartSp := fun x ↦ (hs' x).choose
      have hkx : ∀ x, ∃ f' : kx x ⟶ n, _ := fun x ↦ Set.mem_iUnion₂.1 (hs' x).choose_spec
      let f' : ∀ x : n, kx x ⟶ n := fun x ↦ (hkx x).choose
      have hf' : ∀ x, s (f' x) ∧ x ∈ Set.range (f' x).1 :=
        fun x ↦ exists_prop.1 (hkx x).choose_spec
      let p : ∀ x : n, Eucl (kx x) := fun x ↦ (hf' x).2.choose
      have hp : ∀ x, (f' x).1 (p x) = x := fun x ↦ (hf' x).2.choose_spec
      exact f (f' x) (hf' x).1 (p x)
    ·
      have hs' : ∀ x : n, _ := fun x ↦ Set.mem_iUnion.1 <| hs.2.symm ▸ Set.mem_univ x
      let kx : n → CartSp := fun x ↦ (hs' x).choose
      have hkx : ∀ x, ∃ f' : kx x ⟶ n, _ := fun x ↦ Set.mem_iUnion₂.1 (hs' x).choose_spec
      let f' : ∀ x : n, kx x ⟶ n := fun x ↦ (hkx x).choose
      have hf' : ∀ x, s (f' x) ∧ x ∈ Set.range (f' x).1 :=
        fun x ↦ exists_prop.1 (hkx x).choose_spec
      refine dsmooth_iff_locally_dsmooth.2 (fun x : n ↦ ?_)
      refine ⟨_, (hs.1 _ _ (hf' x).1).isOpen_range, (hf' x).2, ?_⟩
      rw [(DDiffeomorph.ofIsInduction (hs.1 _ _ (hf' x).1).1).isSubduction.dsmooth_iff]
      have : (fun y : Eucl (kx x) ↦ (f' ((f' x).1 y) (by
          have : s ((f' x) ≫ (𝟙 _)) := by simpa using (hf' ((f' x).1 y)).1
          exact (hf' ((f' x).1 y)).1) (by
          exact (hf' ((f' x).1 y)).2.choose)) =
          fun y ↦ f (f' x) (hf' x).1 y := by
        funext y
        have h := @hf _ _ _ (DSmoothMap.const _ y) (DSmoothMap.const _ y) _ _
          (hf' ((f' x).1 y)).1 (hf' x).1 (by ext; rfl)
        exact DFunLike.congr_fun (F := DSmoothMap _ _) h y
      simpa [this]
    · intro l g hg
      ext x
      classical
      have hs' : ∀ x : n, _ := fun x ↦ Set.mem_iUnion.1 <| hs.2.symm ▸ Set.mem_univ x
      let kx : n → CartSp := fun x ↦ (hs' x).choose
      have hkx : ∀ x, ∃ f' : kx x ⟶ n, _ := fun x ↦ Set.mem_iUnion₂.1 (hs' x).choose_spec
      let f' : ∀ x : n, kx x ⟶ n := fun x ↦ (hkx x).choose
      have hf' : ∀ x, s (f' x) ∧ x ∈ Set.range (f' x).1 :=
        fun x ↦ exists_prop.1 (hkx x).choose_spec
      have h := @hf _ _ _ (DSmoothMap.const _ 0) (DSmoothMap.const _ 0) _ _
        (hf' (g x)).1 hg (by ext; rfl)
      exact DFunLike.congr_fun (F := DSmoothMap _ _) h 0
    · intro f''' hf'''
      ext x
      classical
      have hs' : ∀ x : n, _ := fun x ↦ Set.mem_iUnion.1 <| hs.2.symm ▸ Set.mem_univ x
      let kx : n → CartSp := fun x ↦ (hs' x).choose
      have hkx : ∀ x, ∃ f' : kx x ⟶ n, _ := fun x ↦ Set.mem_iUnion₂.1 (hs' x).choose_spec
      let f' : ∀ x : n, kx x ⟶ n := fun x ↦ (hkx x).choose
      have hf' : ∀ x, s (f' x) ∧ x ∈ Set.range (f' x).1 :=
        fun x ↦ exists_prop.1 (hkx x).choose_spec
      have hmem := (hf' x).2
      rcases hmem with ⟨y, rfl⟩
      have := congrArg (fun (t : DSmoothMap _ _) ↦ t y) (hf''' (f' x) (hf' x).1)
      simpa using this

classical
    rw [CartSp.openCoverTopology, isSheaf_iff_isSheaf_of_type, Presieve.isSheaf_coverage]
    intro n s hs f hf
    refine ⟨⟨fun x ↦ ?_, ?_⟩, ?_, ?_⟩
    · have hs' : ∀ x : n, _ := fun x ↦ Set.mem_iUnion.1 <| hs.2.symm ▸ Set.mem_univ x
      let k := fun x ↦ (hs' x).choose
      have hk : ∀ x, ∃ f' : k x ⟶ n, _ := fun x ↦ Set.mem_iUnion₂.1 (hs' x).choose_spec
      let f' := fun x ↦ (hk x).choose
      have hf' : ∀ x, s (f' x) ∧ x ∈ Set.range (f' x).1 :=
        fun x ↦ exists_prop.1 (hk x).choose_spec
      exact f (f' x) (hf' x).1 (hf' x).2.choose
    ·
      refine dsmooth_iff_locally_dsmooth.2 (fun x : n ↦ ?_)
      have hs' : ∀ x : n, _ := fun x ↦ Set.mem_iUnion.1 <| hs.2.symm ▸ Set.mem_univ x
      let k := fun x ↦ (hs' x).choose
      have hk : ∀ x, ∃ f' : k x ⟶ n, _ := fun x ↦ Set.mem_iUnion₂.1 (hs' x).choose_spec
      let f' := fun x ↦ (hk x).choose
      have hf' : ∀ x, s (f' x) ∧ x ∈ Set.range (f' x).1 :=
        fun x ↦ exists_prop.1 (hk x).choose_spec
      refine ⟨_, (hs.1 _ _ (hf' x).1).isOpen_range, (hf' x).2, ?_⟩
      rw [(DDiffeomorph.ofIsInduction (hs.1 _ _ (hf' x).1).1).isSubduction.dsmooth_iff]
      have hf'' : ∀ l (g : l ⟶ n) (hg : s g),
          (fun y : n ↦
              (let k := fun x ↦ (hs' x).choose
               let f' := fun x ↦ (hk x).choose
               let hf' := fun x ↦ exists_prop.1 (hk x).choose_spec
               f (f' y) (hf' y).1 (hf' y).2.choose)) (g y)) =
            f g hg y := by
        intro l g hg y
        have hs'' : ∀ x : l, _ := fun x ↦ Set.mem_iUnion.1 <| hs.2.symm ▸ Set.mem_univ (g x)
        let k' := fun x ↦ (hs'' x).choose
        have hk' : ∀ x, ∃ f' : k' x ⟶ n, _ := fun x ↦ Set.mem_iUnion₂.1 (hs'' x).choose_spec
        let f'' := fun x ↦ (hk' x).choose
        have hf'' : ∀ x, s (f'' x) ∧ g x ∈ Set.range (f'' x).1 :=
          fun x ↦ exists_prop.1 (hk' x).choose_spec
        have h := @hf _ _ 0 (DSmoothMap.const _ (hf' (g y)).2.choose)
          (DSmoothMap.const _ y) _ _ (hf' (g y)).1 hg
          (by ext; exact (hf' (g y)).2.choose_spec)
        exact DFunLike.congr_fun h 0
      convert (f (f' x) (hf' x).1).2
      ext y
      exact hf'' _ _ (hf' x).1 y
    · intro l g hg; ext x
      have hs' : ∀ x : n, _ := fun x ↦ Set.mem_iUnion.1 <| hs.2.symm ▸ Set.mem_univ x
      let k := fun x ↦ (hs' x).choose
      have hk : ∀ x, ∃ f' : k x ⟶ n, _ := fun x ↦ Set.mem_iUnion₂.1 (hs' x).choose_spec
      let f' := fun x ↦ (hk x).choose
      have hf' : ∀ x, s (f' x) ∧ x ∈ Set.range (f' x).1 :=
        fun x ↦ exists_prop.1 (hk x).choose_spec
      have h := @hf _ _ 0 (DSmoothMap.const _ (hf' (g x)).2.choose)
        (DSmoothMap.const _ x) _ _ (hf' (g x)).1 hg
        (by ext; exact (hf' (g x)).2.choose_spec)
      exact DFunLike.congr_fun h 0
    · intro f''' hf'''; ext (x : n)
      have hs' : ∀ x : n, _ := fun x ↦ Set.mem_iUnion.1 <| hs.2.symm ▸ Set.mem_univ x
      let k := fun x ↦ (hs' x).choose
      have hk : ∀ x, ∃ f' : k x ⟶ n, _ := fun x ↦ Set.mem_iUnion₂.1 (hs' x).choose_spec
      let f' := fun x ↦ (hk x).choose
      have hf' : ∀ x, s (f' x) ∧ x ∈ Set.range (f' x).1 :=
        fun x ↦ exists_prop.1 (hk x).choose_spec
      rw [← (hf' x).2.choose_spec]
      exact (DFunLike.congr_fun (hf''' (f' x) (hf' x).1) _).trans
        (congr_fun (by
          ext y
          have h := @hf _ _ 0 (DSmoothMap.const _ (hf' ((f' x) y)).2.choose)
            (DSmoothMap.const _ y) _ _ (hf' ((f' x) y)).1 (hf' x).1
            (by ext; exact (hf' ((f' x) y)).2.choose_spec)
          exact DFunLike.congr_fun h 0) _).symm

classical
    rw [CartSp.openCoverTopology, isSheaf_iff_isSheaf_of_type, Presieve.isSheaf_coverage]
    intro n s hs f hf
    have hs' : ∀ x : n, _ := fun x ↦ Set.mem_iUnion.1 <| hs.2.symm ▸ Set.mem_univ x
    let k' := fun x ↦ (hs' x).choose
    have hk : ∀ x, ∃ f' : k' x ⟶ n, _ := fun x ↦ Set.mem_iUnion₂.1 (hs' x).choose_spec
    let f' := fun x ↦ (hk x).choose
    have hf' : ∀ x, s (f' x) ∧ x ∈ Set.range (f' x).1 :=
      fun x ↦ exists_prop.1 (hk x).choose_spec
    let ω'' := fun x ↦ f (f' x) (hf' x).1 (hf' x).2.choose
    have hω'' :
        ∀ l (g : l ⟶ n) (hg : s g), ω'' ∘ g = f g hg := fun l g hg ↦ by
          ext x
          dsimp [ω'']
          have h := @hf _ _ 0 (DSmoothMap.const _ (hf' (g x)).2.choose)
            (DSmoothMap.const _ x) _ _ (hf' (g x)).1 hg
            (by ext; exact (hf' (g x)).2.choose_spec)
          exact DFunLike.congr_fun h 0
    refine ⟨⟨ω'', ?_⟩, ?_, ?_⟩
    · refine dsmooth_iff_locally_dsmooth.2 fun x : n ↦
        ⟨_, (hs.1 _ _ (hf' x).1).isOpen_range, (hf' x).2, ?_⟩
      rw [(DDiffeomorph.ofIsInduction (hs.1 _ _ (hf' x).1).1).isSubduction.dsmooth_iff]
      convert (f (f' x) (hf' x).1).2
      exact hω'' (k' x) (f' x) (hf' x).1
    · intro l g hg; ext x; exact congr_fun (hω'' l g hg) _
    · intro ω''' hω'''; ext (x : n)
      rw [← (hf' x).2.choose_spec]
      exact (DFunLike.congr_fun (hω''' (f' x) (hf' x).1) _).trans
        (congr_fun (hω'' _ (f' x) (hf' x).1) _).symm

rw [CartSp.openCoverTopology, isSheaf_iff_isSheaf_of_type, Presieve.isSheaf_coverage]
    intro n s hs f hf
    classical
    refine ⟨⟨fun x ↦ ?_, ?_⟩, ?_, ?_⟩
    · have hs' : ∀ x : n, _ := fun x ↦ Set.mem_iUnion.1 <| hs.2.symm ▸ Set.mem_univ x
      let k' := fun x ↦ (hs' x).choose
      have hk : ∀ x, ∃ f' : k' x ⟶ n, _ := fun x ↦ Set.mem_iUnion₂.1 (hs' x).choose_spec
      let f' := fun x ↦ (hk x).choose
      have hf' : ∀ x, s (f' x) ∧ x ∈ Set.range (f' x).1 :=
        fun x ↦ exists_prop.1 (hk x).choose_spec
      let f'' := fun x ↦ f (f' x) (hf' x).1 (hf' x).2.choose
      exact f'' x
    ·
      have hs' : ∀ x : n, _ := fun x ↦ Set.mem_iUnion.1 <| hs.2.symm ▸ Set.mem_univ x
      let k' := fun x ↦ (hs' x).choose
      have hk : ∀ x, ∃ f' : k' x ⟶ n, _ := fun x ↦ Set.mem_iUnion₂.1 (hs' x).choose_spec
      let f' := fun x ↦ (hk x).choose
      have hf' : ∀ x, s (f' x) ∧ x ∈ Set.range (f' x).1 :=
        fun x ↦ exists_prop.1 (hk x).choose_spec
      let f'' := fun x ↦ f (f' x) (hf' x).1 (hf' x).2.choose
      refine dsmooth_iff_locally_dsmooth.2 fun x : n ↦
        ⟨_, (hs.1 _ _ (hf' x).1).isOpen_range, (hf' x).2, ?_⟩
      rw [(DDiffeomorph.ofIsInduction (hs.1 _ _ (hf' x).1).1).isSubduction.dsmooth_iff]
      convert (f (f' x) (hf' x).1).2 using 1
      ext y
      have hf'' : ∀ l (g : l ⟶ n) (hg : s g),
          (fun z : n ↦ f'' z) ∘ g = f g hg := fun l g hg ↦ by
            ext z
            dsimp [f'','f'','f'']
            have hs' : ∀ x : n, _ := fun x ↦ Set.mem_iUnion.1 <| hs.2.symm ▸ Set.mem_univ x
            let k' := fun x ↦ (hs' x).choose
            have hk : ∀ x, ∃ f' : k' x ⟶ n, _ := fun x ↦ Set.mem_iUnion₂.1 (hs' x).choose_spec
            let f' := fun x ↦ (hk x).choose
            have hf' : ∀ x, s (f' x) ∧ x ∈ Set.range (f' x).1 :=
              fun x ↦ exists_prop.1 (hk x).choose_spec
            let f'' := fun x ↦ f (f' x) (hf' x).1 (hf' x).2.choose
            have h := @hf _ _ 0 (DSmoothMap.const _ (hf' (g z)).2.choose)
              (DSmoothMap.const _ z) _ _ (hf' (g z)).1 hg
              (by ext; exact (hf' (g z)).2.choose_spec)
            exact DFunLike.congr_fun h 0
      exact congr_fun (hf'' (k' x) (f' x) (hf' x).1) y
    · intro l g hg
      ext x
      have hs' : ∀ x : n, _ := fun x ↦ Set.mem_iUnion.1 <| hs.2.symm ▸ Set.mem_univ x
      let k' := fun x ↦ (hs' x).choose
      have hk : ∀ x, ∃ f' : k' x ⟶ n, _ := fun x ↦ Set.mem_iUnion₂.1 (hs' x).choose_spec
      let f' := fun x ↦ (hk x).choose
      have hf' : ∀ x, s (f' x) ∧ x ∈ Set.range (f' x).1 :=
        fun x ↦ exists_prop.1 (hk x).choose_spec
      let f'' := fun x ↦ f (f' x) (hf' x).1 (hf' x).2.choose
      have hf'' : ∀ l (g : l ⟶ n) (hg : s g),
          (fun z : n ↦ f'' z) ∘ g = f g hg := fun l g hg ↦ by
            ext z
            dsimp [f'','f'','f'']
            have h := @hf _ _ 0 (DSmoothMap.const _ (hf' (g z)).2.choose)
              (DSmoothMap.const _ z) _ _ (hf' (g z)).1 hg
              (by ext; exact (hf' (g z)).2.choose_spec)
            exact DFunLike.congr_fun h 0
      exact congr_fun (hf'' l g hg) x
    · intro f''' hf'''
      ext (x : n)
      have hs' : ∀ x : n, _ := fun x ↦ Set.mem_iUnion.1 <| hs.2.symm ▸ Set.mem_univ x
      let k' := fun x ↦ (hs' x).choose
      have hk : ∀ x, ∃ f' : k' x ⟶ n, _ := fun x ↦ Set.mem_iUnion₂.1 (hs' x).choose_spec
      let f' := fun x ↦ (hk x).choose
      have hf' : ∀ x, s (f' x) ∧ x ∈ Set.range (f' x).1 :=
        fun x ↦ exists_prop.1 (hk x).choose_spec
      let f'' := fun x ↦ f (f' x) (hf' x).1 (hf' x).2.choose
      have hf'' : ∀ l (g : l ⟶ n) (hg : s g),
          (fun z : n ↦ f'' z) ∘ g = f g hg := fun l g hg ↦ by
            ext z
            dsimp [f'','f'','f'']
            have h := @hf _ _ 0 (DSmoothMap.const _ (hf' (g z)).2.choose)
              (DSmoothMap.const _ z) _ _ (hf' (g z)).1 hg

classical
    rw [CartSp.openCoverTopology, isSheaf_iff_isSheaf_of_type, Presieve.isSheaf_coverage]
    intro n s hs f hf
    have hs' : ∀ x : n, _ := fun x ↦ Set.mem_iUnion.1 <| hs.2.symm ▸ Set.mem_univ x
    let k' := fun x ↦ (hs' x).choose
    have hk : ∀ x, ∃ f' : k' x ⟶ n, _ := fun x ↦ Set.mem_iUnion₂.1 (hs' x).choose_spec
    let f' := fun x ↦ (hk x).choose
    have hf' : ∀ x, s (f' x) ∧ x ∈ Set.range (f' x).1 :=
      fun x ↦ exists_prop.1 (hk x).choose_spec
    let ω'' := fun x ↦ f (f' x) (hf' x).1 (hf' x).2.choose
    have hω'' : ∀ l (g : l ⟶ n) (hg : s g), ω'' ∘ g = f g hg := fun l g hg ↦ by
      ext x
      dsimp [ω'']
      have h := @hf _ _ 0 (DSmoothMap.const _ (hf' (g x)).2.choose)
        (DSmoothMap.const _ x) _ _ (hf' (g x)).1 hg
        (by ext; exact (hf' (g x)).2.choose_spec)
      exact DFunLike.congr_fun h 0

    · refine dsmooth_iff_locally_dsmooth.2 fun x : n ↦
        ⟨_, (hs.1 _ _ (hf' x).1).isOpen_range, (hf' x).2, ?_⟩
      rw [(DDiffeomorph.ofIsInduction (hs.1 _ _ (hf' x).1).1).isSubduction.dsmooth_iff]
      convert (f (f' x) (hf' x).1).2
      exact hω'' (k' x) (f' x) (hf' x).1
    · intro l g hg; ext x; exact congr_fun (hω'' l g hg) _
    · intro ω''' hω'''; ext (x : n)
      rw [← (hf' x).2.choose_spec]
      exact (DFunLike.congr_fun (hω''' (f' x) (hf' x).1) _).trans
        (congr_fun (hω'' _ (f' x) (hf' x).1) _).symm
